title: Django Segment 11
summary: Late-stage development segment of the Django web framework (circa Django 5.x era). Covers ORM improvements including composite primary keys and expression enhancements, admin interface refinements, authentication system updates, database backend fixes, static files improvements, template engine fixes, test infrastructure additions, and various bug fixes across the framework. Includes work on migration optimization, GIS improvements, and HTTP response handling.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: Late-stage development segment of the Django web framework (circa Django 5.x era). Covers ORM improvements including composite primary keys and expression enhancements, admin interface refinements, authentication system updates, database backend fixes, static files improvements, template engine fixes, test infrastructure additions, and various bug fixes across the framework. Includes work on migration optimization, GIS improvements, and HTTP response handling.

nodes.label: ORM Models Layer
nodes.description: The Django ORM including querysets, fields, expressions, constraints, lookups, and SQL compilation. PRs fix expression handling, improve constraint reduction for AddIndex subclasses, enhance queryset operations, and refine model field behavior.

nodes.label: Test Infrastructure
nodes.description: Django test suite additions and modifications. PRs add test cases for new features, fix existing test edge cases, and expand coverage for admin, models, and authentication modules.

nodes.label: Admin Interface
nodes.description: The Django admin site including changelist, delete confirmation, form error handling, and template blocks. PRs fix ordering when ORDER_VAR is blank, improve delete page titles, add Error: prefix to form error titles, and introduce the extrabody template block.

nodes.label: Authentication System
nodes.description: User authentication, permissions, password handling, and auth backends. PRs improve password hasher behavior, fix permission caching edge cases, and enhance authentication form validation.

nodes.label: Database Backends
nodes.description: Backend implementations for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and Oracle. PRs fix schema introspection, improve backend-specific type handling, and enhance SQL generation for new field types.

nodes.label: Utility Modules
nodes.description: Shared utilities including text, encoding, functional helpers, and HTML processing. PRs fix utility edge cases, improve text handling, and add new helper methods.

nodes.label: GIS Framework
nodes.description: Geographic information system support with spatial backends and geometry operations. PRs fix GIS-specific query generation and improve spatial lookup handling.

nodes.label: Database Core
nodes.description: Core database layer including migrations, transaction management, and connection handling. PRs fix migration optimization for AddIndex subclasses and improve transaction savepoint behavior.

nodes.label: Project Configuration
nodes.description: Root-level configuration and setup files. PRs update project metadata and CI configuration.

nodes.label: Static Files
nodes.description: Static file collection and serving infrastructure. PRs improve static file handling, fix manifest storage edge cases, and enhance finder behavior.

nodes.label: Template Engine
nodes.description: Django template language including loaders, tags, filters, and context processing. PRs fix template tag behavior and improve engine error reporting.

nodes.label: Core Framework
nodes.description: Core components including validators, checks, cache, file handling, and exception classes. PRs fix validator patterns and improve check framework messages.

nodes.label: HTTP Layer
nodes.description: HTTP request/response handling including headers, cookies, and content types. PRs fix response header handling and improve request parsing.

nodes.label: Views Framework
nodes.description: Class-based and function-based views including generic views and debug views. PRs fix view behavior edge cases and improve error handling.

nodes.label: Management Commands
nodes.description: Management command infrastructure and built-in commands. PRs fix command output and improve argument handling.

nodes.label: Email System
nodes.description: Email sending infrastructure including backends and message composition. PRs fix email backend behavior and improve message formatting.

nodes.label: Forms Framework
nodes.description: Form classes, widgets, fields, and validation. PRs fix widget rendering edge cases and improve form field behavior.

edges.label: admin uses ORM for data access and display
admin uses forms for model editing
admin uses auth for permission checks
ORM compiles queries via backend SQL compilers
models use core DB layer for connections/migrations
auth models use ORM for user/permission storage
GIS extends database backends with spatial operations
core validators and checks use utility functions
staticfiles uses core file handling infrastructure
management commands interact with database layer
